texto: WIDE, the margin between carte blanche and the white page. Nevertheless it is not in the margin that you can find me, but in the yet whiter one that separates the word-strewn sheet from the transparent, the written page from the one to be written in the infinite space where the eye turns back to the eye, and the hand to the pen, where all we write is erased, even as you write it. For the book imperceptibly takes shape within the book we will never finish.There is my desert.
explicacao: Citação de Edmond Jabès sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “WIDE, the margin between carte blanche and the white page. Nevertheless it is not in the margin t…” articula reflexao, book, desert em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e desert.

texto: Every work cancels the dark. Every work is a hymn from the other side of memory to a memory that is spellbound. Beauty is death's gift to vulgar life so that it can live in beauty.
explicacao: Citação de Edmond Jabès sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Every work cancels the dark. Every work is a hymn from the other side of memory to a memory that …” articula vida, beauty, books em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como luto e trabalho.
